title: Coordinate a product recall
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate a product recall demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Gather evidence to determine advisability of product recall

pcs.text: Analyse non-conformance and conduct risk assessment to determine source of problem and potential outcome
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse non-conformance and conduct risk assessment to determine source of problem and potential outcome?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse non-conformance and conduct risk assessment to determine source of problem and potential outcome.

pcs.text: Report non-conformance of a scale to warrant recall action to appropriate personnel or agencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report non-conformance of a scale to warrant recall action to appropriate personnel or agencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report non-conformance of a scale to warrant recall action to appropriate personnel or agencies.

pcs.text: Make decision to recall product in a timely manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make decision to recall product in a timely manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make decision to recall product in a timely manner.

pcs.text: Develop protocol for engaging the media during the recall, and seek agreement between the relevant parties
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop protocol for engaging the media during the recall, and seek agreement between the relevant parties?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop protocol for engaging the media during the recall, and seek agreement between the relevant parties.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Gather evidence to determine advisability of product recall

elements.title: Manage recall process and associated record-keeping

pcs.text: Develop protocol for acceptance of recalled product, and seek agreement between the relevant parties
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop protocol for acceptance of recalled product, and seek agreement between the relevant parties?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop protocol for acceptance of recalled product, and seek agreement between the relevant parties.

pcs.text: Communicate to all personnel the need and level of isolation of returned product
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate to all personnel the need and level of isolation of returned product?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate to all personnel the need and level of isolation of returned product.

pcs.text: Maintain accurate records of current stocks and returned product throughout recall period
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain accurate records of current stocks and returned product throughout recall period?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain accurate records of current stocks and returned product throughout recall period.

pcs.text: Store records according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store records according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store records according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Manage recall process and associated record-keeping

elements.title: Oversee re-introduction, disposal and/or destruction of recalled product

pcs.text: Isolate returned product from current stocks, product or facilities in a manner consistent with the level of recall
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Isolate returned product from current stocks, product or facilities in a manner consistent with the level of recall?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Isolate returned product from current stocks, product or facilities in a manner consistent with the level of recall.

pcs.text: Implement disposal or destruction processes according to workplace and controlling authority procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement disposal or destruction processes according to workplace and controlling authority procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement disposal or destruction processes according to workplace and controlling authority procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Oversee re-introduction, disposal and/or destruction of recalled product

elements.title: Conduct post-recall review

pcs.text: Initiate review encompassing all aspects of recall
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Initiate review encompassing all aspects of recall?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Initiate review encompassing all aspects of recall.

pcs.text: Prepare comprehensive report identifying source of problem
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare comprehensive report identifying source of problem?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare comprehensive report identifying source of problem.

pcs.text: Develop recommendations to prevent re-occurrence, and forward to appropriate personnel or agencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop recommendations to prevent re-occurrence, and forward to appropriate personnel or agencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop recommendations to prevent re-occurrence, and forward to appropriate personnel or agencies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Conduct post-recall review

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
